programmes.show_description: Dive into a world of uplifting melodies, driving beats and breakdowns to give you shivers! This is Euphoria at its finest.
Fancy a mash up after midnight? Only massive, ad free anthems to help with your insomnia! More beats, less sleep!
We give you heavy hits, vocal anthems, dirty beats and bangin' basslines. This is the 2010s at it finest!
From Beats International in 1990 to the Wamdue Project in 1999 - Bam Bam presents 65 big party number 1s of the 1990s, back to back and in order.
Need a fix of 90s club classics? Lock in for a marathon of memories as we take you back to the greatest decade of dance! The 90s!
Join Stephanie Hirst as she spins some awesome belters! From 2010 to 2019! Here's the lowdown on her fav 3 tracks of each year.
We give you heavy hits, vocal anthems, dirty beats and bangin' basslines. This is the 2010s at it finest!
Kiss FM legend Bam Bam with 50 mad, crazy and totally bonkers videos of the last three decades! Cheesy grins, wacky dancing and too much hastily applied make-up - you know the score!

programmes.show_name: Take Me To The Clouds Above!
programmes.show_description: The sound that started it all! Join us for a selection of legendary Clubland classics. Expect high-energy beats, the biggest vocal anthems and feel good party vibe for all!
We've raided the Clubland vaults and decided to smash things up a bit! Enjoy some of the most awesome classics there are, mixed and smashed up to perfection.
The late 80s and early 90s: the authorities hated it, the media attacked it, but the people loved it!
From the fields to the clubs! Relive the rave culture with iconic tracks that defined a generation. Pure energy and essential anthems only. Ravers Unite!
Fancy a mash up after midnight? Only massive, ad free anthems to help with your insomnia! More beats, less sleep!
Let's go way back with some classic throwback hits, long forgotten beats and some good old fashioned rave anthems!
Melodic synths, pumping beats and shout out loud lyrics. Live your best life with some Eurodance NRG!
Ibiza in the 90s, what a time to be alive! Join Judge Jules and his hand picked Balearic breakdowns, pumping basslines and killer beats. Lets go back to the party island!
Need a fix of 90s club classics? Lock in for a marathon of memories as we take you back to the greatest decade of dance! The 90s!
Join Stephanie Hirst as she chooses her 50 most iconic but very proper clubland classics of all time! Banger after banger, this will not disappoint.
